sourceFixMap: FLOW-15-FIXMAP-006: second design review finding 1 behavioral assertion.
reviewStandard: At least one domain-level before/after outcome assertion is required; structural success alone is not sufficient.

behavioralAssertions.test: T605-7: masterTenantId can come from tier definition config with canonical default fallback
behavioralAssertions.domainBehavior: Changing the tier definition masterTenantId changes the provisioned result and the seeded FREEDOM masterTenantId value from the canonical default to xiigen-master-configured-tenant.
behavioralAssertions.whyItSatisfiesReview: This is a before/after authority behavior assertion for FLOW-15's identity-critical master tenant decision, not a structural existence check.

behavioralAssertions.test: T608-6: TenantTerminated payload contains tombstoneRef, cancelledAt, dataRetentionDays; no raw PII
behavioralAssertions.domainBehavior: Lifecycle termination payload carries tenant data retention policy and PII-safe tombstone behavior.
behavioralAssertions.whyItSatisfiesReview: This provides additional domain-level lifecycle behavior coverage for termination policy output.

assertionScan.command: Select-String over phase-a.spec.ts and phase-d.spec.ts for T605-7, xiigen-master-configured-tenant, and dataRetentionDays
